title: BetterBundle Preview
description: Preview the bundle contents of BetterBundle plugin
body:
# BetterBundle Preview
Enable preview for bundle directly from your inventory!

For [BetterBundle](https://modrinth.com/plugin/betterbundle-classic) Plugin !!!

# Installation
1. Install Fabric
2. Download the Fabric API
3. Download the BetterBundlePreview

Lower versions of Minecraft Server will gradually support..

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2df11ea2f8172f85202be78971b0f66bebb4747.png)
